originalTitle: Reinforcement Learning Dev: Building a High-Perf Continuous Control Engine in PufferLib
title: Restructuring Continuous Control Environments and Training Multi-Agent Task Suite
summary: Restructured continuous control environments to randomize agent spawns and respawns, improving data diversity and training speed. Trained policies for forging, grouping, predator-prey, and pufferlib logo tasks, added continuous action support, and implemented a pufferfish sprite renderer. Ran hyperparameter sweeps to tune learning.
